storyCollection.title: Primary Advantage B1 Key Story Library

stories.title: The Group Project Plan
stories.description: A class team must plan a project together and learn how to listen, divide jobs, and solve disagreements fairly.

stories.title: The New Student Guide
stories.description: A student helps a new classmate understand the school and discovers that small acts of kindness build trust.

stories.title: The Lunch Table Choice
stories.description: A child must decide whether to sit with old friends or include someone who is often left alone.

stories.title: The Homework Club
stories.description: Students start a small homework club and learn how different strengths can help the whole group.

stories.title: The Class Captain Vote
stories.description: A class election teaches students about responsibility, promises, and choosing a leader carefully.

stories.title: The Lost Library Book
stories.description: A student loses a library book and learns to be honest while searching for a practical solution.

stories.title: The Science Fair Team
stories.description: Friends prepare for a science fair and learn that teamwork matters more than winning first prize.

stories.title: The Playground Promise
stories.description: A broken promise during recess causes a friendship problem that must be repaired with honesty.

stories.title: The School Garden Helpers
stories.description: Students care for a school garden and learn that patient work can create something useful for everyone.

stories.title: The Talent Show Nerves
stories.description: A nervous student prepares for a school talent show with help from friends and a supportive teacher.

stories.title: The Map in the Old Desk
stories.description: Children find an old map in a classroom desk and follow clues that teach them about their school history.

stories.title: The Cave Path
stories.description: A hiking group takes a safe cave path and learns to stay calm when the route becomes confusing.

stories.title: The Island Camp
stories.description: Students on a camp trip explore a small island and learn how to make careful choices outdoors.

stories.title: The River Crossing
stories.description: Friends must cross a shallow river during a nature walk and learn to plan before acting.

stories.title: The Missing Compass
stories.description: A group loses its compass during an outdoor activity and must use clues from nature to return safely.

stories.title: The Forest Shelter
stories.description: Children build a simple shelter during a camp challenge and learn how cooperation saves time.

stories.title: The Old Tower Steps
stories.description: A visit to an old tower becomes a lesson in courage, patience, and respecting historic places.

stories.title: The Mountain Weather Change
stories.description: A walking trip changes when clouds arrive, and the group learns why preparation matters.

stories.title: The Garden Maze
stories.description: Friends enter a garden maze and must use memory and teamwork to find the exit.

stories.title: The Hidden Courtyard
stories.description: Students discover a quiet courtyard at school and work to turn it into a shared reading space.

stories.title: The Vanishing Paintbrush
stories.description: An art room mystery helps students practice careful observation before blaming anyone.

stories.title: The Secret Code Note
stories.description: Friends decode a strange note and discover it is connected to a surprise school event.

stories.title: The Missing Trophy
stories.description: A missing sports trophy leads students to investigate clues and learn the value of patience.

stories.title: The Strange Footprints
stories.description: Footprints near the garden cause confusion until students use evidence to find a simple explanation.

stories.title: The Locked Music Room
stories.description: A locked music room puzzle teaches students to ask the right questions and work with adults.

stories.title: The Case of the Swapped Bags
stories.description: Two similar school bags are mixed up, and classmates must solve the problem before home time.

stories.title: The Library Light
stories.description: A light seen in the library after school leads to a mystery about a forgotten class project.

stories.title: The Disappearing Seeds
stories.description: Seeds vanish from the school garden, and students investigate what really happened to them.

stories.title: The Broken Clock Clue
stories.description: A classroom clock stops at the same time every day, leading students to find a practical cause.

stories.title: The Mystery of the Empty Cage
stories.description: A class pet cage is empty, and students must stay calm while searching safely and carefully.

stories.title: The Relay Team
stories.description: A relay team learns that trust and steady practice can matter more than natural speed.

stories.title: The Basketball Tryout
stories.description: A student prepares for basketball tryouts and learns how to handle disappointment maturely.

stories.title: The Long Swim
stories.description: A swimmer trains for a longer race and learns how small improvements build confidence.

stories.title: The Football Captain
stories.description: A football captain must choose between showing off and helping every teammate improve.

stories.title: The Table Tennis Challenge
stories.description: A student faces a stronger opponent and learns to focus on strategy instead of fear.

stories.title: The School Run
stories.description: A school running event teaches a child how to pace effort and encourage others.

stories.title: The Climbing Wall
stories.description: A climbing lesson helps a nervous student understand courage and safe risk-taking.

stories.title: The Badminton Partner
stories.description: Two students with different styles learn how to communicate during a doubles match.

stories.title: The Rainy Sports Day
stories.description: Bad weather changes sports day plans, and students learn to adapt without losing enthusiasm.

stories.title: The Last-Minute Substitute
stories.description: A student joins a team at the last minute and learns that preparation includes attitude.

stories.title: The Busy Family Morning
stories.description: A child takes more responsibility during a busy morning and discovers how small jobs help everyone.

stories.title: The Grandparent Interview
stories.description: A school assignment leads a child to interview a grandparent and understand family history better.

stories.title: The Younger Cousin Visit
stories.description: An older child cares for a younger cousin and learns patience during a family visit.

stories.title: The Market Errand
stories.description: A child completes a market errand and learns how to plan, ask questions, and manage money carefully.

stories.title: The Family Recipe
stories.description: A family recipe teaches a child about memory, tradition, and helping in the kitchen.

stories.title: The Shared Bedroom Plan
stories.description: Siblings sharing a room learn how to set fair rules and respect each other.

stories.title: The Pet Care Schedule
stories.description: A child creates a pet care schedule and learns that responsibility must be regular, not occasional.

stories.title: The Moving Day Box
stories.description: A family move teaches a child how to handle change and keep important memories safe.

stories.title: The Broken Vase Truth
stories.description: A child breaks a vase and must decide whether to hide the mistake or tell the truth.

stories.title: The Weekend Chore Deal
stories.description: A family agrees on weekend chores and a child learns how fairness works at home.

stories.title: The Pond Clean-Up
stories.description: Students clean a local pond area and learn how litter affects animals and water.

stories.title: The Tree Planting Day
stories.description: A class plants young trees and learns that environmental care takes time and teamwork.

stories.title: The Injured Bird
stories.description: Children find an injured bird and learn the right way to get help from adults.

stories.title: The Recycling Contest
stories.description: A school recycling contest teaches students to reduce waste without turning everything into competition.

stories.title: The Butterfly Garden
stories.description: Students plan a butterfly garden and learn how small habitats support living things.

stories.title: The Beach After the Storm
stories.description: A family sees the beach after a storm and joins a clean-up effort.

stories.title: The Dry Garden Problem
stories.description: A school garden suffers during dry weather, and students design a water-saving plan.

stories.title: The Noisy Park Debate
stories.description: Children discuss how people and animals share a park when noise becomes a problem.

stories.title: The Lost Seedlings
stories.description: A class tries to save weak seedlings and learns what plants need to grow well.

stories.title: The Nature Journal
stories.description: A student keeps a nature journal and learns how careful observation changes understanding.

stories.title: The Broken Robot Kit
stories.description: A robot kit breaks before a demonstration, and students learn to test each part calmly.

stories.title: The Class Video Project
stories.description: A video project teaches students about planning, editing, and using technology responsibly.

stories.title: The Solar Car Race
stories.description: Students build small solar cars and learn how sunlight can become useful energy.

stories.title: The Helpful App Idea
stories.description: Friends design an app idea to solve a school problem and learn to think about users.

stories.title: The Old Radio Repair
stories.description: A child helps repair an old radio and learns how older technology connected people.

stories.title: The Coding Club Bug
stories.description: A coding club finds a difficult bug and learns that mistakes are part of building software.

stories.title: The 3D Printer Plan
stories.description: Students use a 3D printer to make a useful object and learn about design limits.

stories.title: The Digital Poster
stories.description: A student creates a digital poster and learns how images and words work together.

stories.title: The Weather Station
stories.description: A class builds a simple weather station and uses data to make better predictions.

stories.title: The Invention Notebook
stories.description: A young inventor keeps a notebook and discovers that ideas improve through testing.

stories.title: The Community Festival Stall
stories.description: Students help at a festival stall and learn how community events bring different people together.

stories.title: The Library Reading Day
stories.description: A reading day at the library helps students understand how public spaces support learning.

stories.title: The Museum Volunteer
stories.description: A child volunteers at a small museum event and learns why local history matters.

stories.title: The Neighborhood Noticeboard
stories.description: Friends use a noticeboard to share helpful information and solve a local problem.

stories.title: The Food Drive
stories.description: A class organizes a food drive and learns how planning can help people in need.

stories.title: The Cultural Dance Practice
stories.description: Students practice a cultural dance and learn to respect traditions while performing together.

stories.title: The Town Map Project
stories.description: A class makes a town map and learns how places, services, and people connect.

stories.title: The Thank-You Letters
stories.description: Students write letters to community helpers and discover how gratitude can strengthen relationships.

stories.title: The New Park Bench
stories.description: Children help choose a place for a new park bench and learn about shared public spaces.

stories.title: The School Exchange Day
stories.description: Students meet visitors from another school and learn how to ask respectful questions.

stories.title: The Apology That Took Time
stories.description: A student learns that saying sorry matters most when it is honest and followed by better actions.

stories.title: The Secret Worry
stories.description: A child carries a worry alone before learning how talking to a trusted adult can help.

stories.title: The Jealous Friend
stories.description: A friendship becomes tense after one child wins an award, and both learn to handle jealousy.

stories.title: The Brave Question
stories.description: A shy student asks a question in class and discovers that others were wondering too.

stories.title: The Fair Choice
stories.description: A child must choose between an easy advantage and a fair solution during a class game.

stories.title: The Forgotten Invitation
stories.description: A forgotten party invitation creates hurt feelings that friends must understand and repair.

stories.title: The Quiet Leader
stories.description: A quiet student leads a small group and learns leadership does not always mean being loud.

stories.title: The Angry Match
stories.description: A student becomes angry during a game and learns practical ways to pause and respond.

stories.title: The Mistake on Stage
stories.description: A mistake during a performance teaches students how to recover and support each other.

stories.title: The Choice to Share
stories.description: A child with a special item learns when sharing is generous and when setting limits is healthy.

stories.title: The Missed Bus
stories.description: A missed bus teaches friends how to stay calm, ask for help, and solve a travel problem.

stories.title: The Train Platform Mix-Up
stories.description: A family trip becomes confusing when students must read signs and listen carefully.

stories.title: The Rainy Walk Home
stories.description: A rainy walk home teaches children how preparation makes everyday challenges easier.

stories.title: The Airport First Time
stories.description: A first airport trip helps a child understand instructions, patience, and new routines.

stories.title: The Bicycle Route
stories.description: Friends choose a safer bicycle route and learn how planning protects everyone.

stories.title: The Market Bargain
stories.description: A child learns how to compare prices and make a careful choice at a busy market.

stories.title: The Lost Ticket
stories.description: A lost ticket during a trip teaches a child to stay honest and ask the right adult for help.

stories.title: The Long Car Ride
stories.description: A long ride challenges siblings to be patient and make the journey pleasant.

stories.title: The Wrong Turn
stories.description: A walking trip takes a wrong turn, and children use landmarks to find the way back.

stories.title: The Packed Suitcase
stories.description: A child packs for a trip and learns how to choose what is useful instead of bringing everything.
